headline: Analysts Estimate Martin Marietta (MLM) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
summary: Martin Marietta (MLM) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Vulcan Materials: Great Potential, But Not For Shareholders
summary: Vulcan Materials benefits from public infrastructure demand and exposure to high-growth US markets, supporting long-term fundamentals. Read more on VMC stock here.
